name: Worship Team
tagline: Leading the congregation into God's presence
description: Our Worship Team exists to usher TC Thika into authentic encounters with God every Sunday and beyond. We serve through song, instrumentation, and devoted hearts.

name: Quest
tagline: A home for youth and young adults
description: Quest is TC Thika's ministry for young people aged 13–35. We build a community where young people encounter Jesus, develop their gifts, and launch into their God-given purpose.

name: Ladies Ministry
tagline: Women rooted in grace and truth
description: TC Thika's Ladies Ministry is a vibrant sisterhood that empowers women through Bible study, mentorship, community service, and annual conferences.
meetingTime: Second Saturday of each month, 9:00 AM

name: Discipleship
description: The Discipleship ministry trains believers to go deeper in scripture, develop a daily devotional life, and reproduce themselves by mentoring others.

name: Media Ministry
tagline: Amplifying the message beyond our walls
description: Our Media team handles audio, video, live streaming, social media, and graphic design — ensuring that TC Thika's content reaches Thika and the world.

name: Hospitality
tagline: Making every visitor feel at home
description: The Hospitality team is TC Thika's welcoming arms — greeting, ushering, hosting events, and ensuring every person who walks through our doors feels genuinely loved and seen.

name: Creative Arts
tagline: Creativity in the service of the Gospel
description: Drama, spoken word, dance, visual arts — the Creative Arts ministry channels God-given creative gifts to communicate truth in fresh and compelling ways.
